title.en: Soon, Ye Tian left the world of inert beasts.

content.en:
Seeing that the others were still contemplating the Innate Dao Monument, Ye Tian got up and left, without attracting anyone's attention.

Soon, Ye Tian left the world of inert beasts.

After leaving, Ye Tian found a random place and fused the super god-level inert armor talent he had copied before.

The super god-level inert armor talent belongs to the earth talent, so it is fused into Ye Tian's source soil talent, and in one fell swoop, the source earth talent is raised to the super god level.

"Next, there is only a super god-level flesh body talent, once you get another super god-level flesh talent, you can fuse the super god-level flesh body talent with the super god-level source earth talent to form the earth element talent, then you can go to cultivate the chaos divine power Gu Yuan imperial body divine power!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Earth Venerable cultivated as a genius with Chaos Divine Powers, even in Chaos, it was also the top genius, enough to sweep countless Divine Generals, and was at the peak of Chaos Divine General-level combat power.

However, this matter cannot be rushed, it needs to depend on luck!

If you really can't find a super god-level physical body talent, then you can only use the long years to slowly copy some god-level physical body talents, slowly accumulate, and after countless fusions, let the physical body talent metamorphosis.

Right now, Ye Tian had one more important thing to do, and that was to enter the Chaos God Realm, enter the temple, and become the official disciple of that great existence.

That's the most important thing!

The misty area will not open until six thousand years old, and Ye Tian can't enter it at the moment, so he is not in a hurry to enter, but focuses on cultivating the members of the human race and the Heavenly Pavilion.

So, he brought batches of Terran powerhouses into the world of lazy beasts, and let them go to the Innate Dao Monument, but he couldn't bring too many people to go, only the geniuses of the Terran race and the earth venerable powerhouses of the Terran race were qualified to go.

If there were no rules and restrictions, and the people of the entire universe poured into the world of lazy beasts, wouldn't it be chaotic?

Ye Tian would not deliberately break this rule and make himself uncomfortable.

In the blink of an eye, hundreds of years have passed.

this day.

Another dimensional world has collapsed, and the collapse of this dimensional world has attracted the attention of all forces.

Terran fringe areas.

A fragment of the dimensional world descended, and I saw a divine tree that pierced through the void covering an area, and the sacred tree was surrounded by dense humanoid creatures.

The humanoids were pitch black and scaly, and they had an eerie aura on them.

"Void Demon!"

Ye Tian noticed this piece of dimensional world fragment and saw those creatures, and was immediately surprised.

He knew these creatures, thinking that when he was still weak, he had entered the Void Realm, and broke into the Void Demon Clan with a Void Kun, and entered the inner space of the Heavenly Dao Tree of the Void Demon Clan, snatching a large amount of Heavenly Dao Gold Liquid and a Heavenly Dao Wood Heart.

The Void is also a relatively deep dimensional world, but the Void is a bit special, and it is difficult for other creatures to stay in the Void, and only by wearing the Heavenly Dao Leaf can they stay in the Void for a long time.

Before, he also left a lot of Heavenly Dao leaves for the Terrans, and the Terrans also established a station in the Void Realm, but unfortunately the Void Realm is too difficult to identify the location, and it is difficult for the Void Realm to obtain other benefits except for the Heavenly Dao script.

Therefore, later, the Terrans also stopped developing the Void.

Now, the Void has also shattered.

The Heavenly Dao Tree is very precious, although it is useless to Ye Tian, but it is very valuable to the Terran Race, enough to cultivate a large number of Terran geniuses.

Therefore, the Heavenly Dao Tree will fight!

"Hahaha, this treasure tree, I want it!"

A six-star Earth Venerable happened to be near the Heavenly Dao Tree, and was about to snatch it, but the Void Demon Clan was not strong, and without the protection of the Void Realm, they also lost their immortal ability.

In an instant, a large number of Void Demons were wiped out by that six-star Earth Venerable with a single move.

Just as the hands of that six-star earth venerable pulled the Heavenly Dao Tree away, Ye Tian's blow came.

Burst!

A sword light tore through the void, instantly turning the six-star Earth Venerable into powder.

The next moment.

A ray of light enveloped the Heavenly Dao Tree.

Soon after, a Heavenly Dao Tree appeared in the Holy City of the Terran Race.

There are not many Heavenly Dao Trees in the Void Realm, and they were rarely found before because of the Void Realm.

But now that the Void Realm is shattered, the Heavenly Dao Tree is easy to discover.

But the universe is too big, no matter how strong Ye Tian is and how fast he is, he can't snatch all the Heavenly Dao Trees.

With Ye Tian's efforts, he only managed to grab six Heavenly Dao Trees and a lot of Heavenly Dao characters in the end.

But even so, there are still some Heavenly Dao Characters and a small number of Heavenly Dao Trees located all over the universe, waiting for people to discover.

The Heavenly Dao Script is a precious thing for cultivators below the Cosmic God, so the universe is in turmoil again, and many people are fighting for the Heavenly Dao Script.

And the Void Demon Clan is too weak, relying on the immortal ability given by the Void Realm before, they can't be killed, so they are proud to occupy a certain position in the Void Realm.

But now, the Void Demon Clan has lost its immortality and is almost extinct in the universe.

But there is one clan that has become very powerful, and that is the Xukun clan.

Xu Kun is good at spatial ability, and his life-saving ability is very strong, and the best of them even has super god-level spatial talent, which is definitely a special race with the best spatial talent.

Moreover, the Xukun clan has its own heritage, and has a large number of Earth Honorables, and the strongest One Earth Honorable is even comparable to a one-star god general.

Moreover, the Xukun clan is very united, and they can contact each other, so the Xukun clan quickly huddled together, occupied an area, and had a powerful force in the eternal universe.

Terran.

Ye Tian frowned tightly, the current threat in the dimensional world was very large, and the biggest threat was naturally from the origin realm.

There were too many source beasts in the Origin Realm, and their overall strength was not even inferior to that of the Overworld.

Moreover, those peak source beasts in the origin realm are even comparable to the ten-star earth lord with just the strength of their physical bodies, if the origin realm is integrated into the main world and the rules and restrictions are removed, these source beasts may be able to step into the god general level with a little cultivation of divine power and soul, and master some combat techniques.

Of course, when they re-cultivate the Great Dao, their potential must be limited, and there is no hope of detachment, but it is not difficult to become a two- or three-star god general.

In this way, at that time, many god-level source beasts will be born in the eternal universe, which will be a huge challenge for the major forces in the universe.

Moreover, countless source beasts rushed into the main world, and the human race didn't know how many people were going to die, no matter how powerful Ye Tian was, he couldn't stop all the source beasts at once.

And the human race is too scattered, there is a large distance between each star, and each star field is so big, how can it be protected?

After thinking about it, Ye Tian felt that there was only one way to protect the human race in the next tribulation.

"Concentrate the Terrans!"

Ye Tiandao.
